examples: Harry might have saved Griphook's wrinkly skin at the end of Deathly Hallows Part 1, but that doesn't mean the goblin is ready to join the fight .
Harry Potter and the Deathly hallows.
The cold has reason in a deathly grip.
But if I'm not worried about the Y2K bug, I'm deathly afraid of Y2K hysteria.
Everywhere the noise of new buildings going up replaced the deathly silence of the ruins.
